## Summary

Describe the suggestion in one or two sentences.

## What problem does this solve?

Explain the friction point or user need.

## Proposed Improvement

Describe what you would like to see changed.

## Who is affected?

- [ ] Farmer
- [ ] Restaurant
- [ ] Admin / Internal team
- [ ] Other

## Impact

Why would this improve the beta experience?

## Additional Context

Add any examples, screenshots, or workflow notes here.
